name: ddd-workshop
description: DDD pipeline: 5 conversational skills guide a developer from a vague idea to Aggregate design, following the subdomain → BC → Aggregate ordering. requirements-refiner (context + 8-item self-audit + optional web research + 1-Q-at-a-time queue), domain-language-extractor (UL + lightweight event flow + subdomain candidates — not BC candidates), subdomain-classifier (subdomain Core/Supporting/Generic + Slice-first choice), context-designer (BC design + Context Map for the selected slice), aggregate-designer (Design-Level Event Storming + Aggregate + Invariant/Policy, one Aggregate per call). Every skill embeds a shared UX protocol (numbered menus, progress markers, skip-allowed), writes `sources:` headers for stale detection, and supports `--update` mode for delta edits when requirements shift.
